notes: Fixes Codex launches when the turn-completion callback is enabled. With the notify hook on, every Codex launch through a Windows Terminal tab died at startup with "invalid type: string [powershell,...], expected a sequence in notify" — the launcher passes the callback as a --config=notify=[...] argument, and wt.exe re-joins its post-`--` argv into the child command line without re-escaping inner double quotes, so Codex received a bare string where it expected an array. The array now uses TOML literal strings, which mean the same thing and pass through wt untouched. IDE-mode sessions were never affected. The callback is also now verified against a live Codex turn (codex-cli 0.145.0) rather than shipped on inference, with a regression test asserting the argument carries no double quotes.
